thread.title: Texas education board approves optional 'Bible curriculum' for elementary schools starting next year - The Mirror US
thread.title_full: Texas education board approves optional 'Bible curriculum' for elementary schools starting next year - The Mirror US

author: Jack Hobbs
title: Texas education board approves optional 'Bible curriculum' for elementary schools starting next year - The Mirror US
text: The brand-new material will push the boundary between religion and public classrooms in the US and was approved by a Republican-led board despite concerns the material could be conversional or could alienate those who practice other religions The Texas Board of Education has reportedly approved an optional bible-infused curriculum for elementary school students which is slated to start as soon as next year. ( Image: Getty Images) By Jack Hobbs News Reporter 23:23, 22 Nov 2024
